message:
test(core): property-based tests for watchdog and ipc modules (53 tests)

proptest_watchdog.rs (31 tests): Component/HealthStatus enum serde roundtrips,
Display/Ord invariants, ComponentHealth/HealthReport serde with
unhealthy_components() aggregate tests, MuxHealthSample/MuxHealthReport serde.

proptest_ipc.rs (22 tests): IpcRequest tagged enum serde for all 7 variants
(user_var, ping, status, pane_state, set_pane_priority, clear_pane_priority, rpc),
IpcResponse serde with skip_serializing_if validation, constructor invariants
(ok, ok_with_data, error, error_with_code).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
